prebaseline_observations: The first exploratory authoring-boundary probe expected connect denial; Linux Bubblewrap denied socket creation earlier. The probe was corrected, the disposable guest was deleted, and the final checked-in procedure then passed end to end from a fresh guest.

result.candidate_dependencies: exact public lock installed; pip check passed; environment read-only
result.guest_after_probe: deleted; the frozen run must create a fresh instance

runs.command: limactl shell ct-ev -- sh -lc 'cd /Users/engineer/ws/ev/exp/e1 && make verify-evaluator'
limactl shell ct-ev -- sh -lc 'cd /Users/engineer/ws/ev/exp/e1 && make verify SERVICE_COMMAND="python3 -m evaluator.fixtures.service"'

limactl shell ct-ev -- sh -lc 'cd /Users/engineer/ws/ev/exp/e1 && .typing-venv/bin/python -m mypy --strict --warn-unreachable evaluator/isolated_service.py evaluator/rerun.py evaluator/verify_freeze_manifest.py reproduction/candidate_boundary_probe.py reproduction/isolation_lifecycle_probe.py reproduction/isolation_probe.py reproduction/signal_probe.py'
limactl shell ct-ev -- sh -lc 'cd /Users/engineer/ws/ev/exp/e1 && xargs sudo apt-get install --simulate --no-install-recommends < reproduction/apt-packages.txt'
limactl shell ct-ev -- sh -lc 'cd /Users/engineer/ws/ev/exp/e1 && python3 -m compileall -q evaluator reproduction'

limactl shell ct-ev -- sh -lc 'cd /Users/engineer/ws/ev/exp/e1 && python3 -c "import json; from evaluator.schema import assert_contract_alignment; json.load(open(\"public/contract/openapi.v1.json\")); json.load(open(\"reproduction/environment.json\")); assert_contract_alignment()"'
limactl shell ct-ev -- sh -lc 'cd /Users/engineer/ws/ev/exp/e1 && sh -n reproduction/bootstrap-lima.sh reproduction/bootstrap-candidate-lima.sh reproduction/prepare-candidate-lima.sh'

limactl shell ct-ev -- sh -lc 'sudo unshare --net --fork /bin/sh -c "ip link set lo up && bwrap --ro-bind /usr /usr --ro-bind /lib /lib --ro-bind /Users/engineer/ws/ev/exp/e1/reproduction/isolation_probe.py /probe.py --proc /proc --dev /dev --tmpfs /tmp --unshare-user --unshare-pid --unshare-ipc --unshare-uts --unshare-cgroup-try --die-with-parent --uid 65534 --gid 65534 /usr/bin/python3 /probe.py"'

limactl shell ct-ev -- sh -lc 'cd /Users/engineer/ws/ev/exp/e1 && python3 -m evaluator.rerun --candidate-root /tmp/nonexistent-e1-candidate --candidate-module candidate_service --report /tmp/should-not-exist.json'

result.reported_error: e1 manifest is not frozen; candidate execution is prohibited
